scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "corepack pnpm --filter @oslab/api dev" "corepack pnpm --filter @oslab/web dev"
scripts.build: corepack pnpm --filter @oslab/shared build && corepack pnpm --filter @oslab/api build && corepack pnpm --filter @oslab/web build
scripts.lint: corepack pnpm --filter @oslab/api lint && corepack pnpm --filter @oslab/web lint
scripts.test: corepack pnpm --filter @oslab/api test && corepack pnpm --filter @oslab/web test
